jsonLd.title: DMart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
